description: Evaluation test cases for the example skill. Each eval case defines a prompt, expected output description, and concrete expectations for the Grader agent to verify.

evals.prompt: Example prompt that should trigger the skill and produce a meaningful result
evals.expected_output: A description of what correct output looks like for human reviewers
expectations: The skill was triggered successfully (evidence: skill name appears in tool_use or transcript)
Output contains the requested information with correct data
No errors or warnings in the execution transcript

evals.prompt: A second prompt testing a different aspect or edge case of the skill
evals.expected_output: Description of expected output for this specific case
expectations: The skill handled the input correctly
Output format matches the documented specification

evals.prompt: An edge case prompt: empty input, unusual characters, or boundary conditions
expectations: The skill did not crash or produce an unhandled error
A meaningful fallback or error message was provided
The skill maintained its documented behavior constraints
